# Pull Request Template

## Description

Briefly describe your changes:

- Fixes #[issue-number]
- Adds [feature]
- Updates [component]

## Changes

- [ ] `frontend/index.html`
- [ ] `frontend/css/index.css`
- [ ] `frontend/js/index.js`

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on desktop browser(s)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (Chrome dev tools)
- [ ] Booking form validation
- [ ] Gallery lightbox
- [ ] Animations smooth

## Checklist

- [ ] Mobile-responsive
- [ ] Accessibility (keyboard, screen reader)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Zero new dependencies
- [ ] Updated README if public API changes

Closes #[issue-number]
